features: 🍿【Popcorn Bag Size】Top caliber 7cm/ 2.7inch, bottom caliber 5cm/ 2inch, length 11.3cm/ 4.4inch, total 24 popcorn bag.
🍿【Pink Popcorn Bags】There are 3 patterns of popcorn bags, and each pattern has two color colors, so your party looks cute and fashionable.
🍿【Wavy Edge Design】The wavy edges of the popcorn boxes are rounded to prevent scratches. The square design is easy to pick up, foldable and has a large capacity.
🍿【Excellent Quality】Food grade safety materials, paper popcorn boxes can directly contact with food and put candy, cake and popcorn into a bag. Sufficient thickness not easy to damage.
🍿【Wide Range of Applications】Perfect for all kinds of parties, movie nights, picnics or barbecues. Can also be used to prepare food for children when traveling.
description: Not suitable for children under 14 years. For use under adult supervision. Specification: Size: Upper caliber 7cm/ 2.7inch, lower caliber 5cm/ 2inch, length 11.3cm/ 4.4inch. Material: Paper Patterns: Dots pattern, stripe pattern, wave pattern Color: Pink Features: Popcorn bags with food-grade safety materials are able to directly contact with food. Perfect for various parties to store snacks such as popcorn, cookies, desserts, etc. Intimate design, the wavy edges are round and beautiful, foldable have large capacity.
